scope: All English and Arabic HTML pages plus redirect page
image_changes: Added CSS patch to all inline style blocks and css/style.css so hero, page-hero, section and game images use contain/object-position instead of cropping.
Added aspect-ratio based image containers for regular, wide and portrait section images.
Updated all image width/height attributes to match real files in img.
content_changes: Rebuilt main content on all English pages with more practical guidance.
Rebuilt main content on all Arabic pages with localized useful guidance.
Updated meta titles and descriptions for rewritten pages.
Updated footer descriptions and adult-responsibility disclaimer.
